name: @intentsolutionsio/grpc-service-generator
description: Generate gRPC services with Protocol Buffers and streaming support

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install grpc-service-generator\\n  or /plugin install grpc-service-generator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
